visual_attributes.morphology: Anthropomorphic figure with a cylindrical body and carved head
distinctive_features: Decorative regalia often including carved feathers
Painted with mineral and vegetable pigments
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Full-bodied with arms and head often in action poses

domain_specific_visual.FACIAL_FEATURES: Painted or attached pop eyes and painted mouths
domain_specific_visual.REGALIA: Carved and painted clothing, sometimes with real clothing elements

functional_attributes.primary_function: Educational tool for teaching about kachinas

domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLIC_ROLE: Represents kachinas, spirits of deities, natural elements, or ancestors
domain_specific_functional.CEREMONIAL_USE: Given to Hopi girls during ceremonies

relationships.description: Carved by Hopi people to represent kachinas
Used in ceremonies to educate and gift to children

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents spiritual beings and serves as an educational tool
